subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God! In this divine cycle and merciful dispensation, when the Sun of divine bounty from all points [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله در این دور الهی و کور رحمانی که آفتاب بخشش یزدانی از جمیع نقاط
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
